breakdown: This PR stabilizes level-up regressions by replacing the custom `_extract_xp_from_player_data` helper with the existing `extract_character_xp` function, and adds support for `xp_awarded` field from combat/encounter summaries as a higher-priority source. The changes shift to using `ensure_level_up_rewards_pending` instead of implementation detail function. Tests exist for the removed function but appear orphaned; some error handling via isinstance checks exists but relies on coerce_int defaults.
key_changes: Removed `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function (~35 lines) and replaced usages with `extract_character_xp`
Added `xp_awarded` field handling in `_synthesize_generic_rewards_box` for combat path
Added `xp_awarded` field handling in `_synthesize_generic_rewards_box` for encounter path
Changed `_check_and_set_level_up_pending` to call `ensure_level_up_rewards_pending` instead of implementation function
Added isinstance check for combat_summary dict before accessing xp_awarded field
